seoTitle: Jones Hill vs Josephville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jones Hill and Josephville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Jones Hill vs Josephville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jones Hill and Josephville.
heading: Jones Hill vs Josephville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jones Hill, Queensland and Josephville, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Josephville has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Jones Hill (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jones Hill or Josephville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jones Hill has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Josephville scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jones Hill scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Josephville scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jones Hill or Josephville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Josephville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
